title: Disposable Gloves, Size M, Pack of 100, Blue Vinyl Gloves, Powder Free, Latex Free, Comfortable Fit, Suitable for Food Handling, Cleaning, Hairdressing & Multi-Purpose Use
availability_text: This item cannot be dispatched to your selected delivery location. Please choose a different delivery location.
features: POWDER & LATEX FREE: This latex free gloves is ideal for those with latex allergies or sensitive skin, offering safe and comfortable hand protection.
COMFORTABLE FIT: This vinyl blue gloves is designed for ease of use with a beaded cuff that offers extra durability and tear resistance.
AMBIDEXTROUS FIT: This blue disposable gloves is suitable for both left and right hands, reducing waste and improving convenience.
VERSATILE APPLICATION: This blue gloves disposable is ideal for food preparation, cleaning, hairdressing, painting, veterinary work, cosmetics, industrial tasks, and food industry use.
MULTIPLE SIZES: These protective gloves available in sizes small, medium, large, and extra-large sizes, disposable vinyl gloves is suitable for both men and women.
description: Product Description BLUE VINYL GLOVES Vinyl powder free Glove & Disposable in available Small, Medium, Large and X- large Size MULTIPURPOSE GLOVES Vinyl gloves are ideal for a wide range of tasks such as Cooking, Gardening, Cleaning, High Quality Gloves Medical and professional uses and can be used by hairdressers and Beauticians. DISPOSABLE GLOVES Powder free design reduces risk of contamination. Comfortable, super soft and flexible powder free blue Vinyl gloves designed to feel and fit like latex and allow full range of motion and flexibility. Disposable Vinyl Gloves Powder Free Multi-Purpose Vinyl Gloves Powder Free Disposable, Extra Strong - Box of 100
